tagline: Let's grow, speak, and bloom together.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ font-medium tracking-tight leading-none text-primary
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-tight text-primary

surfaces.card: bg-white shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(74,58,40,0.04)] border border-[#E2D9CB] p-8 sm:p-10 transition-transform duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgba(74,58,40,0.08)]

button.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all hover:bg-primary-hover hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
button.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-secondary text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all hover:bg-secondary-hover hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
button.outline: inline-flex items-center justify-center border border-primary text-primary rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all hover:bg-primary hover:text-white

forms.input: w-full bg-white border border-border-default rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-secondary focus:border-transparent transition-all placeholder:text-text-muted text-primary

images.description: Abstract soft warm background beige green pink, use as atmospheric hero background under text
Mother and son sharing a tender moment - use for emotional connection in hero or about section
Young boy laughing, soft natural light - perfect for child speech therapy section
Mature woman and young man collaborating - perfect for adult executive functioning / coaching
Close-up of a tablet with highlighted text - perfect for digital materials shop
Tablet and educational materials laid out on a table
Sage green leaves on white background - use as isolated botanical accents floating in sections
Therapist taking notes during session - professional adult coaching representation

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a full-stack marketing and e-commerce site using Next.js/React.js, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
Target audience is wide (2-18 for kids, up to 99 for adults), so maintain a PREMIUM, PROFESSIONAL, EDITORIAL tone. Avoid childish tropes like primary color blocks or Comic Sans.
Font Loading: Import 'Cormorant Garamond' (weights 400, 500, 600) and 'Manrope' (weights 400, 500, 600, 700) from Google Fonts.
Layout Approach: Use asymmetrical grids with generous padding (p-12, p-16). Avoid centered blocks of text for everything; use left-aligned typography to maintain an editorial feel.
Motion: Implement Framer Motion for scroll animations. Cards and images should have a slow, gentle 'fade up' and subtle scale on hover.
Header: Use a sticky glassmorphic header (bg-[#F5EFE5]/80 with backdrop-blur-xl). Ensure navigation links are accessible.
Data Test IDs: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, form inputs) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').
Shop Feature: Implement digital downloads using Stripe for checkout. Products should be displayed in a clean, high-end bento grid.
Booking Feature: For now, the booking page is just a high-quality scheduling request form (no payment).
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide icons for clean, thin-line iconography that matches the editorial serif fonts.
For images with transparent backgrounds (like the botanical decor), use Framer Motion to make them slowly float or drift in the negative space of the layout.
